accountName.description: Primary account name displayed as the card heading.

accountNameValidationInfo.description: Validation state for `accountName`; shows required-field indicator when `valid` is false and the field is dirty or touched.

alternativeName.description: Secondary (alternative) name shown below the primary account name.

city.description: City label displayed in the card's geographic info row alongside `country`.

country.description: Country label displayed in the card's geographic info row.

dialogTitle.description: Title shown in the photo/record picker dialog when the user taps the photo area.

photo.description: Photo image data bound from the record's photo attribute.

photoTitle.description: Alt text / aria label for the profile photo image.

readonly.description: When `true`, disables photo upload and any editable fields; the card is shown in read-only mode. Bindable via `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean`.

referenceColumn.description: Primary key column name used to load the record the card represents (e.g. `"$Id"`).

timeZone.description: Time-zone label shown in the card footer.

imageClear.description: Fires when the user clears the existing photo.

imageSelected.description: Fires when the user selects a new photo; payload is an `UploadImageData` object.

components.description: Compact account profile card with photo, name, alternative name, country, city, and timezone. Requires CrtCustomer360App package.

allowedActions.description: Action button set to show; defaults to `["Call","Email","Feed","Task"]`. Pass a subset to restrict available actions.

dataSourceName.description: Name of the datasource providing entity identity to the action panel.

entitySchemaName.description: Schema name of the entity for which actions are executed (e.g. `"Contact"`, `"Account"`).

fitContent.description: When `true` (default), the panel shrinks to fit its content width; set to `false` to let the parent control the width.

primaryColumnValue.description: Primary key value (guid) of the entity record that actions will be applied to.

primaryDisplayColumnValue.description: Display value of the primary entity record shown in action confirmation dialogs.

title.description: Heading label rendered above the action buttons. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localised text.

callsCollection.description: Live collection of active call view-models managed by the platform; drives the inbox list.

currentCall.description: Read-only pass-through for the active call lookup value. The setter is intentionally empty — the component manages this value internally and emits it via `currentCallChange`.

currentCallAccount.description: Read-only pass-through for the identified account of the current call. The setter is intentionally empty — the component manages this value internally and emits it via `currentCallAccountChange`.

currentCallContact.description: Read-only pass-through for the identified contact of the current call. The setter is intentionally empty — the component manages this value internally and emits it via `currentCallContactChange`.

currentCallIdentifiedAccounts.description: Read-only pass-through for the list of all identified accounts on the current call. The setter is intentionally empty — the component manages this value internally and emits it via `currentCallIdentifiedAccountsChange`.

currentCallIdentifiedContacts.description: Read-only pass-through for the list of all identified contacts on the current call. The setter is intentionally empty — the component manages this value internally and emits it via `currentCallIdentifiedContactsChange`.

editableAttributesList.description: List of call-record attribute names whose unsaved values are cached and restored across collection reloads.

selectedCallId.description: Database UID of the call record to display as the currently selected/active call.

callsCollectionChange.description: Action fired when the calls collection mutates; wire to a request handler to keep the page attribute in sync.

currentCallAccountChange.description: Action fired when the account identified on the active call changes.

currentCallChange.description: Action fired when the active call changes; emits a `CallLookupValue` or `null` when the call ends.

currentCallContactChange.description: Action fired when the contact identified on the active call changes.

currentCallIdentifiedAccountsChange.description: Action fired when the set of identified accounts on the active call changes.

currentCallIdentifiedContactsChange.description: Action fired when the set of identified contacts on the active call changes.

identityClick.description: Action fired when the user clicks a caller identity badge; emits the `CallIdentity` to drive navigation.

selectedCallIdChange.description: Action fired when `selectedCallId` changes internally; wire to keep the page attribute in sync.

activityCategory.description: Activity category GUID; triggers a live database query to load matching results when set.

activityResultControl.description: `FormControl` bound to the activity result column; the component writes the selected result via `setValue` and reads its validator to determine if the field is required.

allowedResults.description: JSON-serialized array of allowed result GUIDs (e.g. `'["guid1","guid2"]'`). Pass a plain string, not a JS array — the setter calls `JSON.parse` internally. When empty, all results for the current `activityCategory` are shown.

label.description: Heading label shown above the results list. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localised text.

activeColor.description: Icon color for the active/current approval step; use `"white"` for dark backgrounds.

approval.description: Current approval object to display; the widget shows the approver name and objective from this value.

approvalChangedHandler.description: Approval result event; set after a server response to move the widget to the next pending approval and fire navigation custom events.

approvalEntityName.description: Schema name of the approval entity (e.g. `"OrderVisa"`). Used in approve/reject request payloads.

approvalsMetrics.description: Array of approval status counters; drives the pending/positive/negative counts and controls visibility when `hiddenWhenNoData` is true.

dataLoaded.description: Toggle that signals data loading state; when `false` the widget shows a loading indicator.

entityName.description: Schema name of the parent entity (e.g. `"Order"`, `"Invoice"`). Used in the `loadData` request payload.

hiddenWhenNoData.description: When `true`, the widget's parent element is hidden (via `display: none`) if all approval metrics have count zero.

inactiveColor.description: Icon color for inactive/completed approval steps; use `"white"` for dark backgrounds.

linkedSchemaColumnName.description: Column name on the linked schema used to navigate to its record from the widget.

linkedSchemaName.description: Schema name of a linked entity whose records can be opened from the approval widget.

recordId.description: Primary key (guid) of the parent record; subscribes this component to WebSocket approval notifications for that record.

approve.description: Action fired when the user clicks Approve; payload includes `id`, `schemaName`, and `actionType`.

createApproval.description: Action fired to initiate creation of a new approval record; payload contains the creation context.

loadData.description: Action fired to request approval data; payload includes `parentRecordId`, `parentSchemaName`, and `loadApprovalMetrics`.

reject.description: Action fired when the user clicks Reject; payload includes `id`, `schemaName`, and `actionType`.

components.description: Approval widget that renders current approval state, metrics, and next-step content.

bulkActions.description: Mass-action menu items shown when one or more rows are selected (requires `features.rows.selection.multiple: true`). Each item is a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` with a `clicked` request binding receiving the selected rows.

features.description: Feature toggles controlling editing, selection, header, columns and hierarchy. Shape: `{ rows?: { numeration?, selection? }, editable?: { enable?, itemsCreation?, floatingEditPanel? }, columns?: { adding?, dragAndDrop?, resizing?, sorting? }, header?: { visible? }, hierarchical?: { enable? } }`. Omitted branches inherit framework defaults.

fitContent.description: When true the grid hugs its content width; when false it fills the available width of the parent container.

recordId.description: Primary key (guid) of the parent entity record; subscribes this grid to WebSocket approval notifications for that record.

stretch.description: When true the grid stretches to fill the parent container's available height; otherwise it sizes to its content.

style.description: Visual style of the grid. `plain-white` is the default flat look; `glass-effect` enables glassmorphism and switches toolbar buttons to a light variant.

activeRowChange.description: Action invoked when the user activates a different row (typically single-click). Payload is the row's primary key.

cancelItemsChanges.description: Action invoked when the user discards pending inline edits. Payload is the list of changed records being reverted.

columnsChange.description: Action invoked when the user edits the column set (add/remove/reorder via the column toolbar). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the updated column definitions.

createItem.description: Action invoked when a new inline row is created (requires `features.editable.itemsCreation: true`). Payload describes the new row position.

deleteItem.description: Action invoked when the user deletes a row via the row toolbar.

hierarchicalRowsStateChange.description: Action invoked when the overall hierarchy expand/collapse state changes. Payload is the full `HierarchyState`.

hierarchicalRowStateChange.description: Action invoked when a single hierarchical row is expanded or collapsed (requires `features.hierarchical.enable: true`).

paginationChange.description: Action invoked when the user scrolls to load the next page. Payload includes `rowsOffset` and `pageSize` for the request handler.

reloadData.description: Action fired when a WebSocket notification arrives for the bound `recordId`; wire to a `crt.LoadDataRequest` handler to refresh the grid.

rowDoubleClick.description: Action invoked on row double-click — typically used to open the row's record page. Payload is the `DataTableRowContext` for the clicked row.

saveItemsChanges.description: Action invoked when the user commits pending inline edits (requires `features.editable.enable: true`).

selectionStateChange.description: Action invoked when the user changes the selection (checkbox toggles, select-all). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the full `DataGridRowsSelectionState`.

sortingChange.description: Action invoked when the user changes column sorting via the column toolbar. Payload is the updated sorting config array.

components.description: Approval process list showing approval steps, statuses, and actions for a record. Extends DataGrid with WebSocket subscription.

record.description: Object with data of the item record.

tileSizeClasses.description: Returns style classes to specify tile size.

communicationItemsInfo.description: Array of active communication items (calls/chats) shown as indicator badges in the toolbar.

communicationsPanelHasNewMessages.deprecationReason: Used only in sidebar legacy mode.
communicationsPanelHasNewMessages.description: Badge toggle that shows a "new messages" indicator on the communications panel button.

currentLeftPanelTab.description: Active tab value for the left panel toggle group; wire to a page attribute to persist the active tab.

currentRightPanelTab.description: Active tab value for the right panel toggle group; wire to a page attribute to persist the active tab.

globalSearchVisible.description: Toggle to show or hide the global search field in the toolbar.

helpMenuButtonVisible.description: Toggle to show or hide the Help menu button in the toolbar.

navigationPanelVisible.description: Toggle that controls whether the navigation panel is visible; bind to a page attribute to persist state.

notificationsPanelHasNewNotifications.deprecationReason: Used only in sidebar legacy mode.
notificationsPanelHasNewNotifications.description: Badge toggle that shows a "new notifications" indicator on the notifications panel button.

quickAddMenuButtonVisible.description: Toggle to show or hide the Quick-Add menu button in the toolbar.

rightPanelButtonsVisible.description: Toggle to show or hide the right-panel sidebar toggle buttons.

runProcessButtonVisible.description: Toggle to show or hide the Run Process button in the toolbar.

showLegacySidebarsButton.description: Toggle to show the legacy sidebars group button; keep `false` for the current sidebar.

communicationIndicatorClicked.description: Action fired when the user clicks a communication indicator badge; emits the clicked `CommunicationItemInfo`.

createRecord.description: Action fired when the user selects an item from the Quick-Add menu; emits a `QuickAddRequest` with entity name and page name.

leftPanelButtonClicked.deprecationReason: Used only in sidebar legacy mode and for the legacy sidebar group.
leftPanelButtonClicked.description: Action fired when the user clicks a left-panel toggle button.

navigationPanelVisibleChange.description: Action fired when the navigation panel toggle is clicked; emits the new visibility boolean.

rightPanelButtonClicked.deprecationReason: Used only in sidebar legacy mode and for the legacy sidebar group.
rightPanelButtonClicked.description: Action fired when the user clicks a right-panel toggle button.

record.description: Object with data of the item record.

tileSizeClasses.description: Returns style classes to specify tile size.

dataItems.description: Live collection or array of article data items; subscribes to `changed` events on a `BaseViewModelCollection` to auto-update tiles.

galleryItemConfig.description: Article tile configuration; provide `templateValuesMapping` to map datasource attribute names to article model fields (`id`, `caption`, `author`, `modifiedDate`, `tags`, `text`). Omit to use the default `crt.ArticlePreview` factory.

clicked.description: Emits the current autoEnabled state when it changes (on init load or toggle click).

translationError$.description: Action fired when the translation service call fails or returns empty. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>' }` to handle errors; clicking the button again retries the translation.

translationReady.description: Action fired when a translation (or restore-to-original) completes. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>' }` to handle in `handlers`; the event payload is `{ translationKey, translation }` where `translation` may be the restored original on toggle-back.

clicked.description: Action fired when the user toggles translation on or off, or on init when the saved state loads. Payload: `{ autoEnabled: boolean }` — `true` when auto-translate is active.

translationError$.description: Action fired when the translation service call fails or returns empty. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>' }` to handle errors; clicking the button again retries the translation.

translationReady.description: Action fired when a translation (or restore-to-original) completes. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>' }` to handle in `handlers`; the event payload is `{ translationKey, translation }` where `translation` may be the restored original on toggle-back.

color.description: The color of the badge. Can be primary, accent, or warn.

offset.description: Shifts the badge inside or outside the element from its default position.

offsetX.description: Shifts the badge horizontally from its default position.

offsetY.description: Shifts the badge vertically from its default position.

components.description: Badge/notification indicator overlay for child elements with configurable color and offset.

channelSelector.description: Custom template rendered as the channel-selector tab strip above the editor.

composerCacheCode.description: Unique key used by the draft-caching service; must be distinct per composer instance when `useDrafts` is `true`.

dataCachingService.description: Custom draft-caching service; falls back to the injected `ComposerDataCachingService` if not provided.

disabled.description: Component is disabled.

disableSelectionOptions.description: When `true`, hides the selection-options action bar from the composer.

discardBtnVisible.description: Forces the discard button to always show; if `false`, the button appears only when the editor has content.

expandToContent.description: When true, the composer expands to fit its content and may overflow the viewport. When false (default), the composer caps its own height so the Send button stays visible.

fillAvailableHeight.description: When true (or when the composer is rendered inside an `<emailformpage>` host), the editor area also gets a `min-height` equal to the computed viewport-fit budget. That makes the empty editor stretch to fill the available page area instead of collapsing to its intrinsic content height. Stays opt-in so it does not affect mini-page modals, case form, feed, etc.

footerPanelOptions.description: Custom template projected into the footer options area of the composer.

height.description: Fixed height in pixels for the host element; sets the `--height` CSS custom property on the host.

loadAttachments.description: Enables the file-attachment UI and attachment upload flow; set to `false` to disable all attachment handling.

maxAttachmentsSize.description: Maximum total size of all attachments.

maxContentHeight.description: Maximum height of the editor content area with internal scrolling.

selectionActions.description: Custom template injected into the selection-action area of the composer.

sendButtonIcon.description: Icon name for the send button; overrides the default send icon.

selectionChange.description: Emits the current rich-text selection value when the editor selection changes.

caption.description: Static label text (the title part of the pair). Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localizable text.

value.description: Dynamic value displayed alongside the caption; accepts a literal string or a `$Attribute` binding.

allowMenuOnDisabled.description: Allows menu to be opened if button is disabled.

caption.description: Button label (the visible text on the button). Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

clickMode.description: Defines which mode button will work in

color.description: Button visual style (color theme). "primary" = blue filled button (brand action, e.g. Save or Submit); "accent" = green filled button (positive/focus action — shown as "Focus" in the designer); "warn" = red filled button (destructive or error-state action — shown as "Warning" in the designer); "default" = transparent background with subtle text (shown as "Plain" in the designer); "outline" = light-gray background with a blue border (secondary/non-primary action); "plain-white" = transparent with white text, for buttons placed on dark or glassmorphic backgrounds; "outline-white" = semi-transparent with a white border and white text, for glassmorphic themes.

disabled.description: When `true`, disables all click interactions. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

hotkeys.description: Keyboard hotkeys that trigger the button click, using the shared CDK hotkey vocabulary.

icon.description: Button icon. Either an exact registered icon name — the `BUTTON_ICONS` set is the recommended curated list (e.g. `save-button-icon`, `edit-button-icon`), though any name registered in the platform icon registry also resolves; there are no short aliases, so `save` renders nothing (use `save-button-icon`) — or a `ButtonAnimatedIcon` Lottie config object for an animated glyph. Pair with `iconPosition` to control where it appears relative to the caption.

iconPosition.description: Icon placement relative to the caption. `only-icon` hides the caption; `only-text` hides the icon. Defaults to `'right-icon'`; set `'only-text'` for a caption-only button — the common choice for mobile action buttons.

menuItems.description: Dropdown menu items shown on click. With `clickMode: 'default'` the chevron opens the menu; with `clickMode: 'menu'` the whole button does.

size.description: Button size. `none`/`default` are coerced to `large` at runtime.

clicked.description: Action invoked when the user clicks the button. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to bind to a request handler; without `request` the click does nothing.

components.description: Clickable action element for requests, navigation, menus, and page commands.

allowUntoggle.description: When true clicking the currently pressed toggle deselects it (group can be empty). When false at least one toggle stays pressed.

badgeConfig.description: Badge style shared by every toggle's badge — color and offset of the small indicator dot/count. Individual badge values come from the items themselves.

contentAlign.description: Alignment of label and icon inside each toggle button. Defaults to `start`.

direction.description: Layout direction of the toggle row. `row` arranges horizontally (default); `column` stacks vertically.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with every toggle in the group. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

fitContent.description: When true the group hugs its content width; when false it fills the available width of the parent container.

gap.description: Spacing between toggle buttons. Accepts a `SizeEnum` token (`none`/`small`/`medium`/...) or a number of pixels.

iconSize.description: Icon size used inside each toggle button.

items.description: Collection of selectable items, each shaped like `{ value, displayValue, icon?, ... }`. For `crt.ButtonToggleGroup` with `for: '<TabPanelName>'`, the preprocessor populates this from the linked `crt.TabPanel` — do not bind manually in that case.

menuButtonsMode.description: When true each toggle behaves like a dropdown trigger (its `menuItems` open instead of toggling pressed state). Use for menu-styled toggle groups.

toggleViewMode.description: How the group renders. `button` (default) shows side-by-side toggles; `dropdown` collapses them into a single dropdown-style picker.

value.description: Currently pressed toggle (a `{ value, displayValue }` object). When the view config has `for: '<TabPanelName>'`, the preprocessor manages this and `items` from the linked `crt.TabPanel` — do not bind manually in that case.

valueChange.description: Action invoked when the selected item changes. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the new selected item.

components.description: Group of mutually exclusive toggle buttons. Container for ButtonToggleGroupItem children.

ariaLabel.description: Button aria label.

disabled.description: State of disabled.

displayMenuIcon.description: When true, shows the dropdown-menu chevron icon on the toggle button. Used together with `menuButtonsMode: true` to indicate that the toggle opens a menu.

value.description: Button value.

colorizationType.description: Tile color strategy: `"default"` uses a fixed color, `"byField"` reads from `colorizationColumn`, `"byOwner"` colors by participant.

dateRangeLimitInDays.description: Maximum allowed date span for the quick-filter range; a range larger than this shows a warning.

endBusinessTime.description: Business-hours end time in `HH:mm` format (e.g. `"18:00"`); controls the shaded working-hours band.

filters.description: Date-range filter array from a quick-filter component; each entry drives the visible calendar range.

items.description: Collection of calendar event records bound from a datasource attribute; changes trigger a re-render of tiles.

lightweightModeLimit.description: Item count threshold above which lightweight (low-detail) tile rendering is activated; `null` disables the limit.

maxDuplicatesByOwner.description: Maximum tiles per participant when `colorizationType` is `"byOwner"`; caps duplicate event rendering.

miniPageSchemaName.description: Schema name of the mini-page opened when the user clicks a tile; if empty, the full edit page opens instead.

pageSize.description: Number of items loaded per page; when the collection length reaches a multiple, the user is prompted to load more.

participantFilters.description: Participant lookup values used to filter tiles when `colorizationType` is `"byOwner"`.

showWeekends.description: When `true`, Saturday and Sunday columns are visible; `false` hides them and adjusts the day-view count.

startBusinessTime.description: Business-hours start time in `HH:mm` format (e.g. `"09:00"`); controls the shaded working-hours band.

templateValuesMapping.description: Maps datasource attribute paths to calendar tile roles (start, end, title, notes, colorizationColumn).

timeScale.description: Slot duration for the time-grid in `HH:mm:ss` format (e.g. `"00:30:00"` for 30-minute slots).

useAllDayMeeting.description: When `true`, events spanning ≥ 24 h are treated as all-day events in the tile layout.

useAutoScrollToCurrentTime.description: When `true`, the time-grid scrolls to the current time on view change and on init.

endBusinessTimeChange.description: Emits the updated `endBusinessTime` string when the user changes the business-hours end setting.

highlightArea.description: Action fired when the user starts selecting an area; payload includes the selection start/end dates.

loadNextPage.description: Action fired when the loaded item count is a multiple of `pageSize` and the user confirms loading more.

openEditPage.description: Action fired when the user double-clicks a tile to open its record; payload includes `schemaName` and `recordId`.

openPositionedMiniPage.description: Action fired instead of `openEditPage` when `miniPageSchemaName` is set; includes click coordinates for positioning.

silenceCreate.description: Action fired when the user draws a new area on the calendar (drag-to-create); payload includes start/end dates and an optional title.

startBusinessTimeChange.description: Emits the updated `startBusinessTime` string when the user changes the business-hours start setting.

components.description: Calendar and scheduler component with tile templates, filtration support, and date-range navigation.

currentCall.description: Active call state object; ignored when `isStandAlone` is `true` (component self-subscribes to CTI state).

currentCallAccount.description: Setter exists for two-way attribute binding only; actual account value is computed from the call identity.

currentCallContact.description: Setter exists for two-way attribute binding only; actual contact value is computed from the call identity.

currentCallIdentifiedAccounts.description: Setter exists for two-way attribute binding only; computed from all account identity options on the call.

currentCallIdentifiedContacts.description: Setter exists for two-way attribute binding only; computed from all contact/employee identity options on the call.

outboundNumber.description: Outbound caller ID shown in the dial panel; auto-synced from `callerId` during an active outbound call.

callConversationChange.description: Emits the full `CallConversation` object whenever any call data changes (alias for `currentCallChange`).

currentCallAccountChange.description: Emits the resolved account `LookupValue` whenever the call identity changes.

currentCallChange.description: Emits the updated call state object whenever call data changes (identity select, hold, transfer, etc.).

currentCallContactChange.description: Emits the resolved contact `LookupValue` whenever the call identity changes.

currentCallIdentifiedAccountsChange.description: Emits all identified account lookups whenever the call identity options change.

currentCallIdentifiedContactsChange.description: Emits all identified contact/employee lookups whenever the call identity options change.

identityClick.description: Action fired when the user clicks a caller identity link; payload is a `CallIdentity` with `entityName` and `id` for navigation.

campaignId.description: GUID of the campaign record to render; bind to `$Id` on a campaign form page.

fitContent.description: Defines if 'fit-content' class is applied to host component

components.description: [object Object],[object Object],[object Object]

channels.description: Array of available channel configurations; chat-type channels are auto-hidden when the chat license is inactive.

selectedChannelIndex.description: Zero-based index of the currently active channel in the `channels` array; drives the selected-tab visual state.

selectedSchemaType.description: Schema type of the active chat channel; used to restore the selected tab when multiple chat channels share the same index.

selectedChannelIndexChange.description: Emits the parent-composer index of the newly selected channel when the user clicks a tab.

selectedChatSchemaTypeChange.description: Emits the schema type string of the selected chat channel; empty string for non-chat channels.

pagingConfig.description: Paging config for drill down datagrid.

columnsChange.description: Fire event when datagrid columns are changed.

drillDown.description: Fire event when chart column clicked.

getProfileColumns.description: Fire event when profile columns are requested.

paginationChange.description: Fire event when datagrid drill down pagination change.

resetToDefault.description: Fire event when datagrid reset to default action called.

searchFilterChange.description: Fire event when analytics widget search filter is changed.

sortingChange.description: Fire event when datagrid sorting is changed.

components.description: Embedded chart widget for bar, line, pie, doughnut, area, spline, scatter, horizontal-bar, funnel, and waterfall charts. Configured via a series-based data model with entity schema aggregation.

combinedModeButtonVisible.description: Controls visibility of the combined/split mode toggle button in the chat header.

combinedModeEnabled.description: Toggle that allows the user to switch between combined (side-by-side) and split view modes. When `false`, the mode-switch action is disabled and the toggle button is hidden.

fitContent.description: Layout toggle that shrinks the container to fit its children. When `false`, the container reserves its full grid-cell area.

isCombinedMode.description: Style toggle that switches the layout between combined (chat list + conversation side-by-side) and split (full-screen conversation) view. Bind to a page attribute to drive responsively.

items.description: Child view elements rendered inside this container.

padding.description: Container padding. Accepts a single size keyword (`none`/`xs`/`s`/`m`/`l`/`xl`/`xxl`/`small`/`medium`/`large`) or a per-side object `{ top, bottom, left, right }`.

stretch.description: Layout toggle that lets the container fill the available width/height of its parent grid cell. When `false`, the container keeps its intrinsic size.

changeCombinedMode.description: Action fired when the component auto-detects that the layout should switch between combined and split mode (based on container width). Payload is `true` for combined, `false` for split.

chatViewInit.description: Action fired once when the chat view finishes rendering. Useful for triggering post-init data load.

combinedModeButtonVisibleChange.description: Action fired when the combined/split toggle button visibility changes. Bind to a request to sync the value into a page attribute.

combinedModeEnabledChange.description: Action fired when the combined mode toggle value changes. Bind to a request to persist the new value.

openChatSession.description: Action fired when the user selects a chat from the list. Payload (`@event`) is the session `Guid`. Bind as `{ request: "...", params: { session: { id: "@event" } } }`.

openChatSessionWithMessage.description: Action fired when a chat session should be opened with a pre-filled message. Payload shape: `{ sessionId: Guid, message: string }` — use `@event.sessionId` and `@event.message` in params.

components.description: Chat container that hosts conversation content and switches between split and combined layouts.

record.description: Object with data of the item record.

tileSizeClasses.description: Returns style classes to specify tile size.

channels.description: Array of available chat channel configurations (Telegram, SMS, etc.). When multiple channels are available, a channel-type selector is shown.

chatInput.description: Current message text in the composer input field. Bind to a page attribute and sync via the `chatInputChange` output to keep the value in page state.

filesToUpload.description: Files queued for upload with this message. Each file is rendered as a `crt.ChatAttachmentTile`. Bind to a page attribute; clear after send via the `filesToUploadChange` output.

icon.description: Icon identifier for the composer channel. Can be overridden via low-code schema configuration.

items.description: Projected template items rendered inside the composer body (e.g. custom action buttons).

providerId.description: Active omnichannel provider identifier. Changing this value resets channel and contact selections.

recipientContacts.description: List of available recipient contacts for the current provider. Each item populates the To contact dropdown. Populated by page logic after provider selection.

selectedChannelId.description: Identifier of the currently selected sender channel (From). Bind to a page attribute synced via `selectedChannelIdChange` to preserve the selection across renders.

selectedChannelSchemaType.description: Schema type of the currently selected channel (e.g. `"OmnichannelChatSchema"`). Used to look up channel-specific behavior and restrictions.

selectedContactId.description: Identifier of the currently selected recipient contact (To). Bind to a page attribute synced via `selectedContactIdChange` to preserve the selection across renders.

sendersChannels.description: List of available sender channels for the current provider. Each item populates the From channel dropdown. Populated by page logic after provider selection.

chatCreated.description: Action fired once when a new chat is created. Payload is the new chat `Guid`.

chatIdChange.description: Action fired whenever the resolved chat id changes (including after creation). Sync to a page attribute to make the current chat id available to other components.

chatInputChange.description: Action fired on every keystroke in the message input. Payload (`@event`) is the current text value. Sync to a page attribute to persist the draft message.

editorPlaceholderKeyChange.description: Action fired when the placeholder label key changes (e.g. due to WhatsApp window expiry). Payload is a resource string key.

editorReadonlyChange.description: Action fired when the message editor readonly state changes due to channel restrictions.

editorTooltipChange.description: Action fired when an editor tooltip should be shown or cleared. Payload: `{ type, text }` or `null`.

filesToUploadChange.description: Action fired when the attachment list changes. Payload is the updated `File[]` array. Clear the bound attribute after a successful send.

messageInputDisabledChange.description: Action fired when the message input disabled state changes (e.g. channel restriction active).

selectedChannelIdChange.description: Action fired when the user selects a different sender channel. Payload is the channel `Guid`.

selectedContactIdChange.description: Action fired when the user selects a different recipient contact. Payload is the contact `Guid`.

sendDisabledChange.description: Action fired when the Send button disabled state changes due to channel or selection constraints.

sendMessage.description: Action fired when the user clicks the Send button. Wire to a request that dispatches the message.

templateSelectDisabledChange.description: Action fired when the template select disabled state changes (e.g. during active chat with another agent).

caption.description: Disclaimer text rendered as trusted HTML. Use a localized or server-provided value; the setter bypasses Angular security sanitization via `DomSanitizer`.

consentCode.description: Consent code identifier passed back in the `acceptClicked` params to record which notice was accepted.

fitContent.description: Layout toggle that shrinks the container to fit its children. When `false`, the container reserves its full grid-cell area.

items.description: Child view elements rendered inside this container.

padding.description: Container padding. Accepts a single size keyword (`none`/`xs`/`s`/`m`/`l`/`xl`/`xxl`/`small`/`medium`/`large`) or a per-side object `{ top, bottom, left, right }`.

stretch.description: Layout toggle that lets the container fill the available width/height of its parent grid cell. When `false`, the container keeps its intrinsic size.

acceptClicked.description: Action fired when the user clicks the Accept button. Wire as `{ request: "...", params: { consentCode: "<same-code>" } }` to record consent.

chat.description: Chat data object to display in this list row (title, author, last message preview, date).

chatMenuItems.description: Dropdown menu items shown in the chat row context menu. Each item must be a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` with `type: "crt.MenuItem"` and a `clicked` binding.

isCombinedMode.description: Style toggle: `true` renders the item in combined (side-by-side) mode; `false` in split mode.

isSelected.description: Highlighted state: `true` applies the selected style to this row. Set by the parent `crt.ChatList`.

searchFilter.description: Search query string used to highlight matching words in the chat title and message preview.

chats.description: Array of `ChatPreview` records to render as chat rows. Bind to a page attribute; append new pages to the array on each `loadData` event for infinite scroll.

currentPage.description: Current pagination page number. Bind to a page attribute and reset to `0` when the search filter changes.

focusedChatId.description: Identifier of the chat row that currently has keyboard focus. Bind to a page attribute and sync via `focusedChatIdChange` for accessibility tracking.

isCombinedMode.description: Style toggle: `true` renders the list in combined (side-by-side) mode; `false` in split mode.

menuItems.description: Context menu items shown on each chat row. Each item must be a `crt.MenuItem` config with a `clicked` binding.

searchDisableFeatureName.description: Feature flag name that disables the search input when the flag is enabled. Pass the flag name string, not a boolean.

searchFilter.description: Search query text used to filter the chat list. Sync to a page attribute via `searchFilterChange`. Changing this value resets the chat list and triggers a new `loadData` request.

selectedChatId.description: Identifier of the currently selected chat. The matching row gets the selected style.

showNoDataBlankState.description: Controls whether an empty-state illustration is shown when `chats` is empty.

chatClicked.description: Action fired when the user clicks a chat row. Payload (`@event`) is the full `ChatPreview` object. Bind as `{ request: "...", params: { session: "@event" } }` to open the selected chat.

chatsListChange.description: Action fired when the chat rows array changes internally (e.g. after search reset). Sync to the `chats` page attribute to keep page state consistent.

createChatClicked.description: Action fired when the user clicks the create-chat button. Wire to a request that initializes a new chat session.

currentPageChange.description: Action fired when the page number changes. Sync back to the `currentPage` attribute.

focusedChatIdChange.description: Action fired when keyboard focus moves to a different chat row. Payload is the chat id string.

loadData.description: Action fired when the list needs more rows (infinite scroll or initial load). Payload: `{ count: number, search: string }`. Use `@event.count` and `@event.search` in params.

searchFilterChange.description: Action fired when the user changes the search value. Payload is the new query string. Sync back to the `searchFilter` page attribute and reset the `chats` array and `currentPage`.

chatId.description: Identifier of the current chat session. When set, the component loads available quick actions from the chat service. Must be a valid non-empty `Guid`.

contactId.description: Identifier of the contact associated with the chat. Passed to the business process as `ContactId`.

disabled.description: Disabled style toggle. When `true`, the quick actions button is inactive.

actionExecuted.description: Action fired after a quick-action business process completes. Payload (`@event`) is the process name string.

chatId.description: Identifier of the chat session to transfer. Required for the backend transfer API call.

disabled.description: Disabled style toggle. When `true`, the transfer button is inactive.

systemMessageTemplate.description: Chat message template that carries source metadata (`chatId`, `channelId`, `queueId`) needed for transfer routing. Fetch from `OmnichannelChatService.getMessageTemplate()`. Shape: `{ message?, messageDirection?, chatId?, channelId?, queueId? }`.

chatTransferred.description: Action fired when the transfer completes. Payload: `{ operatorId, operatorName }` for agent transfer or `{ queueId, queueName }` for queue transfer.

chatId.description: Identifier of the chat session to transfer. Passed to the transfer API.

systemMessageTemplate.description: Chat message template that carries source metadata (`chatId`, `channelId`, `queueId`) for transfer routing. The `queueId` field is used to exclude the current queue from target list. Shape: `{ message?, messageDirection?, chatId?, channelId?, queueId? }`.

chatTransferred.description: Action fired after a successful transfer. Payload: `{ operatorId, operatorName }` for agent transfer or `{ queueId, queueName }` for queue transfer.

listOpenChange.description: Action fired when the dropdown opens or closes. Payload is a boolean (`true` = open).

author.description: Contact whose avatar and name are shown beside the typing animation. When `author.name` is `"Creatio.ai"`, the avatar is hidden and a default icon is used instead.

loading.description: Loading/skeleton state toggle. When `true`, the indicator shows a loading placeholder.

message.description: Label displayed next to the animation (e.g. "Typing…"). Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the checkbox.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: When `true`, locks the checkbox from user interaction.

inversed.description: Invert the visual state — shows a checked appearance when the bound value is `false`.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: When true the checkbox is locked from user interaction and visually appears disabled. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Current boolean value or bound view-model attribute (e.g. `'$PDS_IsActive'`).

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

valueChange.description: Action invoked when the checked state changes. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to bind a request handler; without `request` the change does not trigger custom logic (the bound `control` still updates).

components.description: Boolean input rendered as a checkbox.

color.description: Color value for the chip. Pass a hex string (e.g. `"#8B9FDA"`) or a semantic keyword. The setter auto-computes a contrasting text color and a lightened background color.

readonly.description: Readonly toggle. When `true`, `itemClick` and `itemRemove` events are suppressed and the remove button is hidden.

wrap.description: Layout toggle. When `true` (default), chips wrap to multiple lines. When `false`, chips stay on one line and overflow items are replaced by a `+N` counter that opens an overlay.

itemRemove.description: Action fired when the user clicks the remove button on a chip. Payload (`@event`) is the `{ caption, color?, value? }` item config. Suppressed when `readonly: true`.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

pickerMode.description: Picker style: `"basic"` shows only the swatch grid; `"extended"` adds a HEX/RGBA editor panel.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

selectedColor.description: Programmatically sets the current color value; writes directly into `control.value`. Use `control` for form-bound pages.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

mode.description: Lookup mode (List or Selection Window). List by default.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: When true the combobox is locked from user interaction. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

sortFilteringFn.description: Function for sorting items when filtering.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

useStaticFiltering.description: Sets state of using static filtering.

value.description: Sets value to control.

valueChange.description: Action invoked when the selected value changes. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the new `LookupValue`. The bound `control` updates automatically regardless.

components.description: Lookup or selection field with optional add-record and list actions.

caption.description: Menu item label. Pass the resolved string; raw translate keys trigger a console warning and are auto-resolved.

details.description: Arbitrary details payload passed to the `clicked` event as `event.detail`. Opaque to the component.

items.description: Nested submenu items. Each entry is a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` accepting the same properties as this component.

components.description: Action shown in a ComboBox dropdown, usually for create-record or custom lookup actions.

columnsCount.description: Number of side-by-side columns the entries are laid out in; coerced to 1 when zero or falsy.

numberColumnName.description: Row view-model attribute name holding the entry's value — the phone number, email, or social handle (the `<DataSource>_<Column>` attribute over the `Number` column), not the bare column name.

optionActions.description: Extra per-entry actions appended to each row's overflow menu.

readonly.description: When true, the whole panel is read-only: entries are shown but cannot be added, edited, or removed.

showNoDataPlaceholder.description: When true, shows a placeholder image while the list is empty; turn off on compact sidebar layouts.

typeColumnName.description: Row view-model attribute name holding the communication type (the `CommunicationType` lookup) — the `<DataSource>_<Column>` attribute key, not the bare entity column name.

components.description: Communication options panel displaying phone, email, and social media contact details with inline editing.
useCases: Display and edit a contact's communication channels (phone, email, web, social)

components.entityCouplingNote: Bound to the built-in Contact/Account communication model; not available on custom entities.

itemViewConfig.description: View element config template applied to every item in the collection; each item is rendered using this config.

viewModels.description: Reactive collection of view-model items to project; must be a `BaseViewModelCollection` for change detection.

birthDate.description: Contact birth date value; drives the age display below the name.
