createItem.description: Action invoked when a new inline row is created (requires `features.editable.itemsCreation: true`). Payload describes the new row position.

deleteItem.description: Action invoked when the user deletes a row via the row toolbar.

hierarchicalRowsStateChange.description: Action invoked when the overall hierarchy expand/collapse state changes. Payload is the full `HierarchyState`.

hierarchicalRowStateChange.description: Action invoked when a single hierarchical row is expanded or collapsed (requires `features.hierarchical.enable: true`).

paginationChange.description: Action invoked when the user scrolls to load the next page. Payload includes `rowsOffset` and `pageSize` for the request handler.

rowDoubleClick.description: Action invoked on row double-click — typically used to open the row's record page. Payload is the `DataTableRowContext` for the clicked row.

saveItemsChanges.description: Action invoked when the user commits pending inline edits (requires `features.editable.enable: true`).

selectionStateChange.description: Action invoked when the user changes the selection (checkbox toggles, select-all). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the full `DataGridRowsSelectionState`.

sortingChange.description: Action invoked when the user changes column sorting via the column toolbar. Payload is the updated sorting config array.

components.description: Tabular list component for ListPage records and inline grid actions.
useCases: Display records in rows and columns with sorting and selection
components.whenToUse: Use for tabular data with columns, sorting, and row selection.
components.whenNotToUse: Not for image/photo collections (use crt.Gallery) or a simple non-tabular list (use crt.List).

control.description: Form control injected by the DataGrid framework; do not set manually in the column values.

dateType.description: Date granularity for the picker: `"Date"` = date only, `"Time"` = time only, `"DateTime"` = full date+time.

pickerViewMode.description: Picker view mode forwarded to the underlying datetime picker.

readonly.description: Disables user input when `true`. Prefer the DataGrid column `editable` flag for static read-only columns.

timeSelectionInterval.description: Time selection interval (in minutes) used by the list-based picker view.

useSeconds.description: When `true`, the time picker shows a seconds field. Only meaningful for `"Time"` and `"DateTime"` types.

control.description: Form control injected by the DataGrid framework; do not set manually in the column values.

isFormatValidated.description: When `true`, validates the entered text as an RFC 5322 email address before saving.

readonly.description: Disables user input when `true`. Prefer the DataGrid column `editable` flag for static read-only columns.

control.description: Form control bound to this cell. Bind via `$AttributeName` referencing the DataTable datasource attribute.

items.description: Dropdown list items. Bind to an attribute holding an array of `LookupValue` objects populated by the `showList` handler.

listActions.description: Additional action menu items shown in the dropdown. Each must be a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` with a `clicked.request`.

mode.description: Lookup display mode controlling whether a selection window icon is shown alongside the combo-box.

readonly.description: When `true`, the cell renders as read-only and the combo-box is disabled.

useStaticFiltering.description: When `true`, filters the dropdown client-side against the current `items` list; prefer `false` with a `showList` handler for large datasets.

value.description: Current lookup value displayed in the cell. Must be a `LookupValue` object `{ value, displayValue }`; use a converter when the attribute holds a raw GUID.

paginationChange.description: Fires when the user scrolls to the end of the dropdown list; use to load the next page of items.

selectionWindowIconPressed.description: Fires when the user presses the selection window icon in `mode: 'combined'`; open a lookup selection dialog in the handler.

showList.description: Fires when the user types to search; payload includes `filterValue`. Wire to a `crt.LoadDataRequest` handler to load matching items.

valueChange.description: Fires when the user selects a new lookup value. Wire to a request handler to persist the change to the datasource.

control.description: Form control bound to the cell's numeric input. Bind via `$AttributeName` referencing the DataTable datasource attribute.

format.description: Display format for the numeric value. Set `decimalPrecision` to control how many decimal places are shown and allowed.

readonly.description: When `true`, the cell renders as read-only and the numeric input is disabled.

control.description: Form control bound to the cell's phone input. Bind via `$AttributeName` referencing the DataTable datasource attribute.

displayAsPhone.description: When `true`, activates country-code selector and phone-number formatting. Set to `true` for phone columns.

isViewCellMode.description: Internal flag indicating the cell is in view (non-edit) mode; do not set explicitly in `editingCellView` — the editing slot is always in edit mode.

readonly.description: When `true`, the cell renders as read-only and the phone input is disabled.

control.description: Form control bound to the cell's text input. Bind via `$AttributeName` referencing the DataTable datasource attribute.

mask.description: Optional input mask applied to the text field. Pass an `InputMaskConfig` object `{ mask: "<pattern>" }` (imask format).

readonly.description: When `true`, the cell renders as read-only and the input is disabled.

tooltip.description: Static hint text shown on the cell. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

control.description: Form control bound to the cell's URL input. Bind via `$AttributeName` referencing the DataTable datasource attribute.

readonly.description: When `true`, the cell renders as read-only and the URL input is disabled.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

mode.description: Possible the view that the calendar should be in.

multiYearSelector.description: State of active multiyear view when click on year.

pickerType.description: Possible picker types for crt-picker component.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

preventSameDateTimeSelection.description: Prevent user to select same date time.

readonly.description: When true the date/time picker is locked from user interaction. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

startView.description: Possible the view that the calendar should start in.

timeSelectionInterval.description: Time selection interval used by list-based picker view.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

useTwelveHourFormat.description: Sets state of using twelve-hour format.

value.description: Sets value to control.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Date, time, or datetime picker bound to a page attribute.

caption.description: Field label displayed above the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

value.description: `FormControl` bound to the text input value.

enterKeyDown.description: Fires when the user presses Enter in the input field.

label.description: Text label displayed inside the element. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

orientation.description: Requested placement direction. The runtime auto-orients the line perpendicular to the parent flex flow, so inside a flex layout this acts as the initial/seed value; it is honoured directly only when there is no flex ancestor (e.g. a grid cell or plain block parent). Unsupported values fall back to `horizontal`.

padding.description: Divider spacing around the line. Accepts token, pixel, CSS length, or per-side padding and maps it to host margins.

thickness.description: Divider line thickness in pixels. String/object values are normalized and unsupported values fall back to `1`.

config.description: Extra properties merged on top of the auto-selected delegate cell config. Use to pass type-specific overrides (e.g. `{ format: { decimalPrecision: 2 } }`) without knowing the cell type at authoring time.

dataValueType.description: `DataValueType` integer that selects the delegate cell: Text→`crt.DataTableEditTextCell`, Lookup→`crt.DataTableEditLookupCell`, Integer/Float/Money→`crt.DataTableEditNumericCell`, Date/DateTime→`crt.DataTableEditDateTimeCell`, Boolean→`crt.TableBooleanCell`.

valueAttribute.description: Bare attribute name (without `$` prefix) whose `FormControl` the delegate cell binds to. The component constructs `control: "$${valueAttribute}"` internally.

bcc.description: Initial Bcc recipient list. Each entry is an email address string.

bindingColumns.description: Column bindings that map activity entity columns to page attributes for two-way sync.

body.description: Rich-text email body (HTML string). Setting this replaces the current editor content.

cc.description: Initial Cc recipient list. Each entry is an email address string.

composerEvent.description: Array of `ComposerEvent` objects dispatched programmatically (e.g. reply, forward). Use `{ name: 'CrtEmailReply', params: { emailId, action } }` to trigger reply mode.

defaultSenderRequest.description: Request type fired on load to populate the sender mailbox list. Use `"crt.DefaultSenderComposerRequest"` unless custom logic is required.

emailId.description: GUID of an existing email activity to reply to or forward. Setting this switches the composer into reply/forward mode.

entitySchemaName.description: Entity schema name for the related record context (e.g. `"Activity"`, `"Account"`).

expandOnLoad.description: When `true`, auto-expands the composer body on load so the user can immediately start typing.

from.description: Pre-selected sender address (mailbox identity string). Set to pre-fill the From field; overridden by `sendersMailboxes` once loaded.

headerExpanded.description: Toggle the expanded state of the email header (from/to/subject row). Fires `headerExpandedChange` on change.

headerLabelsWidth.description: Width of the header label column (From/To/Cc labels) in pixels; auto-adjusted when reply button is visible.

height.description: Fixed height of the composer in pixels. When not set, the composer grows with its content.

icon.description: Icon identifier for the composer channel. Can be overridden via low-code schema configuration.

isReplyExpanded.description: When `true`, the reply thread is expanded by default; when `false` it is collapsed.

recipientsMailboxes.description: Known recipient mailbox metadata used to auto-resolve recipient display names in To/Cc/Bcc fields.

recordId.description: GUID of the related record (e.g. `"$Id"`). Used for draft caching and attachment context.

sendersMailboxes.description: List of available sender mailboxes loaded on demand via `defaultSenderRequest`. Populates the From dropdown.

skeletonLoading.description: When `true`, shows a skeleton placeholder while the composer data is loading.

subject.description: Email subject line. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized default text. The value is applied to a new email only; reply/forward/edit-draft prefill is never overridden.

subjectReadonly.description: When `true`, the subject field is read-only: the user cannot edit it manually, while system-driven values (reply/forward prefill, drafts, templates) still populate it.

to.description: Initial To recipient list. Each entry is an email address string; updates the To field once set.

visibleBcc.description: Toggle visibility of the Bcc field. When set to `true` the Bcc row is shown; fires `visibleBccChange` on user toggle.

visibleCc.description: Toggle visibility of the Cc field. When set to `true` the Cc row is shown; fires `visibleCcChange` on user toggle.

bccChange.description: Fires when the user changes the Bcc recipient list.

bodyChange.description: Fires when the user edits the email body.

ccChange.description: Fires when the user changes the Cc recipient list.

emailComposerCleared.description: Fires when the user clears/resets the composer content.

emailComposerSaved.description: Fires when the email is saved as a draft or sent; payload contains the email and save parameters.

fromChange.description: Fires when the user changes the sender. Sync to a page attribute to persist the selection.

headerExpandedChange.description: Fires when the user collapses or expands the email header section.

refreshRecipients.description: Fires to request a refresh of the recipient autocomplete data.

subjectChange.description: Fires when the user edits the subject line. Sync to a page attribute to read the final value.

toChange.description: Fires when the user changes the To recipient list.

visibleBccChange.description: Fires when the user toggles the Bcc field visibility.

visibleCcChange.description: Fires when the user toggles the Cc field visibility.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

isFormatValidated.description: Email format validation toggle. When `true`, attaches a regex validator that rejects malformed addresses; when `false`, any string is accepted.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

multiline.description: Whether the input renders as a multi-line textarea. Disabled for email/url data types via the data source attribute.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Current input value. Setting this updates the bound `control`; prefer binding `control` via the data source attribute and read this for one-way reads.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Email-specific text input with frontend email validation behavior.

attachToSelector.description: CSS selector for the input/textarea element where the emoji should be inserted at the cursor position. If omitted, insertion uses the `chatInput` string only.

chatId.description: GUID of the active chat. Passed to the picker for per-chat emoji history tracking.

chatInput.description: Current text in the chat input. The component uses this to know the cursor position for emoji insertion; bind two-way with `chatInputChange`.

disabled.description: When `true`, the emoji picker button is disabled and the picker cannot be opened.

chatInputChange.description: Fires with the updated chat text after emoji insertion. Wire to a handler that writes the value back to the `chatInput` page attribute to keep state in sync.

emojiSelected.description: Fires when the user selects an emoji; payload is `{ emoji: string }` where `emoji` is the native Unicode character.

components.description: Emoji selection component for chat messages. Provides a button to open emoji picker and handles emoji insertion at cursor position.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

state.description: Current mask state of the value. `masked` shows dots; `unmasked` reveals the plaintext (toggled by the eye button unless `unmaskingDisabled`).

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

unmaskingDisabled.description: Toggle that disables the unmask (eye) button. When `true`, the user cannot reveal the value even when it is non-empty and the control is enabled.

value.description: Current input value. Setting this updates the bound `control`; prefer binding `control` via the data source attribute and read this for one-way reads.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

toggleMaskValue.description: Action invoked when the user clicks the unmask (eye) button. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to typically flip `state` between `masked` and `unmasked`.

valueChange.description: Action invoked (throttled to 500ms) when the user edits the input value. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to react to value changes.

components.description: Masked secure input for secrets and encrypted values.

displayMode.description: Display mode controlling the tree layout. `EntityHierarchyDisplayMode.ByParentDisplayMode` shows a flat parent-child structure.

expandedItems.description: Array of node GUIDs that are currently expanded in the tree. Bind two-way with `expandedItemsChange`.

nodes.description: Tree of hierarchy nodes to display. Setting this replaces the currently rendered tree; use `searchResultNodes` for incremental search results.

searchResultNodes.description: Incremental search result nodes appended to the tree during live search; set in response to `loadSearchNext`.

selectedNodeId.description: GUID of the currently selected node; setting this programmatically selects that node in the tree and emits `nodeClick`.

selectedTabIndex.description: Index of the active tab: `0` = hierarchy tree, `1` = specification filters. Bind two-way with `tabIndexChange`.

specificationEntityName.description: Entity schema name for the specification sub-filter (secondary tab); passed to `loadSpecificationFilters` on tab activation.

specificationFiltersConfiguration.description: Array of specification filter definitions for the secondary tab. Set in response to `loadSpecificationFilters`.

specificationReferenceColumnName.description: Schema column name that references the specification entity; used to load specification filters for the selected node.

expandedItemsChange.description: Fires when the user expands or collapses a tree node; payload is the updated array of expanded node GUIDs.

loadNext.description: Fires to request the next page of child nodes; payload is the array of parent nodes whose children should be loaded.

loadSearchNext.description: Fires during live search to request the next batch of search results; payload includes `searchPhrase`, `number` (batch size), and `offset`.

loadSpecificationFilters.description: Fires when the user opens the specification filters tab; payload is `specificationEntityName`. Load `specificationFiltersConfiguration` in the handler.

nodeClick.description: Fires when the user selects a node; payload is the selected node GUID. Apply the hierarchy filter to the grid in the handler.

specificationFilterChange.description: Fires when the user changes a specification filter value; payload contains the updated filter state.

tabIndexChange.description: Fires when the active tab changes between the tree tab (0) and the specification filters tab (1).

components.description: Hierarchical entity filter tree for catalog-style navigation with specification filters and multi-tab display.

aggregationValue.description: its string, because string | number is not supported in OpenApi

filters.type:
( | BooleanComparisonFilter | MathComparisonFilter | StringComparisonFilter | DateComparisonFilter | RelativeDateComparisonFilter | LookupComparisonFilter | IsNullComparisonFilter | IsNotNullComparisonFilter | FilterGroup
	)[]

authorId.description: GUID of the author/user record; combined with `photoImageId` to check whether a photo exists.

authorName.description: Display name of the person/author; used for accessibility labels and avatar initials.

icon.description: Explicit icon glyph name from the platform icon library. Overrides the `tileKey` fallback when set; leave unset to use `tileKey` auto-resolution.

iconSize.description: Size of the icon. `'default'` renders at base size (no modifier class); use a named keyword (`'small'`, `'large'`, etc.) for explicit sizing.

photoImageId.description: GUID of the photo image asset; when valid and non-empty, the photo is displayed instead of the icon glyph.

tileIconId.description: GUID of a custom tile image asset; displayed if valid and non-empty, taking priority over the `tileKey` glyph fallback.

tileKey.description: Schema or entity type key (e.g. `"contact"`) used to pick the default icon glyph; falls back to `default-entity-icon` if the key is not in the registry.

allowedStages.description: Stages the user is permitted to select; when set (non-null), clears the loading state. Updated by the `setAllowedStages` handler.

appropriateSchema.description: Recommended DCM schema data; used in the snackbar notification caption when `isAppropriateEntityStageSchema` is `false`.

askUserToChangeSchema.description: Show a snackbar notification when `isAppropriateEntityStageSchema` becomes `false` (requires the `EntityStageProgressbar-ShowSnackbar` feature flag). Default `true`.

currentStage.description: The highlighted stage in the progress bar (the active step). Synced from `value`; also re-emits `setAllowedStages`.

entityName.description: Entity schema name of the record; forwarded to `loadData` so the handler knows which DCM stage pipeline to fetch.

isAppropriateEntityStageSchema.description: Whether the current DCM stage schema matches the recommended one. When set to `false` and `askUserToChangeSchema: true`, shows a snackbar notification (requires `EntityStageProgressbar-ShowSnackbar` feature flag).

recordId.description: Record ID of the entity whose stage pipeline is displayed. Setting a non-empty value triggers `loadData` via a `setTimeout(0)` call.

saveOnChange.description: Trigger a silent record save immediately when the user selects a new stage. Set to `false` to defer saving to the standard Save action.

stageConnections.description: DCM stage connection rules; forwarded to `setAllowedStages` to compute which stages the user can navigate to from the current stage.

stageRunningProcessUId.description: UId of an in-progress DCM process. While non-empty, suppresses `loadData` re-triggers; set to `null`/empty after the process completes to unlock reload.

stages.description: Array of `Step` objects defining the pipeline stages to render. Setting an empty array hides the component by setting `display: none` on its parent element.

stageSchemaFilterByValue.description: Filter lookup value that scopes the DCM stage schema; when changed (and stages are loaded), triggers a data reload to switch to the matching pipeline.

value.description: Current stage as a `LookupValue` (`{ value: Guid, displayValue: string }`); converted to a `Step` internally and triggers `setAllowedStages` re-emission.

changeToAppropriateEntityStageSchema.description: Action fired when the user confirms switching to the recommended DCM schema via the snackbar notification.

checkIsAnAppropriateProcessSchema.description: Action fired to validate whether the current stage schema matches the recommended one. Handler must set `isAppropriateEntityStageSchema` and `appropriateSchema`.

loadData.description: Action fired when `recordId` is set; handler must load the DCM stage pipeline and populate `stages`, `allowedStages`, and related inputs.

setAllowedStages.description: Action fired whenever `currentStage`, `stageConnections`, `stages`, or `allowedStages` changes. Handler must compute and set the `allowedStages` input.

stageChanged.description: Action fired when the user clicks a stage or when `value` changes. Payload includes the selected `stage`, `stages`, `stageConnections`, `allowedStages`, `doSave`, and `silentSave` flags.

components.description: Stage progress bar for DCM (Dynamic Case Management) entity stages. Shows clickable stage steps with transitions and process schema integration.

expanded.description: Initial expanded state. `true` opens the panel on render; the user can still collapse it (see `expandedChange`).

fitContent.description: Layout toggle that shrinks the container to fit its children. When `false`, the container reserves its full grid-cell area.

fullWidthHeader.description: Layout toggle for the header. When `true` the title bar stretches the full panel width; when `false` it shrinks to `titleWidth` characters and tools fill the remaining space.

items.description: Child view elements rendered inside this container.

labelColor.description: Header label color. Accepts CSS color values (hex, rgb, named).

padding.description: Container padding. Accepts a single size keyword (`none`/`xs`/`s`/`m`/`l`/`xl`/`xxl`/`small`/`medium`/`large`) or a per-side object `{ top, bottom, left, right }`.

stretch.description: Layout toggle that lets the container fill the available width/height of its parent grid cell. When `false`, the container keeps its intrinsic size.

title.description: Panel header label. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

titleWidth.description: Header title width in characters when `fullWidthHeader` is `false`. Ignored when `fullWidthHeader` is `true`.

togglePosition.description: Placement of the expand/collapse toggle relative to the header label. `before` puts the chevron to the left of the title; `after` to the right.

toggleType.description: Visual style of the expand/collapse toggle. `default` shows the legacy chevron; `material` shows the Material outlined arrow.

tools.description: Buttons and other action controls rendered in the panel header alongside the title.

closed.description: Action invoked when the panel transitions from expanded to collapsed. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`.

expandedChange.description: Action invoked whenever the expanded state changes, carrying the new boolean value as payload. Use this to mirror state into a view attribute via two-way `expanded` binding.

opened.description: Action invoked when the panel transitions from collapsed to expanded. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to react to expansion (e.g. lazy-load child content).

components.description: Collapsible container with header, title, tools area, and nested items content.

allowExternalPost.description: Toggle that enables posts visible to external users (e.g. portal contacts) alongside internal messages.

cardState.description: Card form state. Bind as `"$CardState"` so the post composer hides while the parent record is in `Add` mode.

dataSourceName.description: Name of the page data source providing the parent record. Required when `feedType` is `Record`.

entitySchemaName.description: Entity schema name the feed loads messages for (e.g. `"Contact"`, `"Account"`). Required when `feedType` is `Record`.

feedType.description: Feed source mode. `Record` shows posts attached to the bound record (requires `entitySchemaName` + `primaryColumnValue`); `User` shows the current user's activity stream.

primaryColumnValue.description: Identifier of the parent record. Typically bound as `"$Id"` to follow the page's master record.

primaryDisplayColumnValue.description: Display name of the parent record. Used in post composer hints and notifications.

showBlankSlate.description: Toggle that renders the empty-state placeholder when the feed has no messages. Set `false` to hide the feed entirely while empty.

components.description: Record or user feed with post composer support, selection actions, and incremental message loading.

allowExternalPost.description: Show the external-audience toggle. When `true` and the user is not an SSP, the composer shows a toggle to switch between internal and external publishing.

cardState.description: Page card state. When `ModelInPageAction.Add` (new record not saved), the composer is automatically disabled.

composerEvent.description: Array of composer events for cross-component communication. Currently handles `'BlindZoneWidthChangedEvent'` to adjust the footer indent.

entitySchemaName.description: Entity schema name for the record; used for mention lookups and external-publishing access checks.

forExternal.description: Current external-publishing toggle state. When `true`, the message is posted to external (portal) audience; tracks the user's runtime selection.

forExternalDefault.description: Default value for the external-publishing toggle; also sets the current `forExternal` state on write so it resets when the user cancels.

icon.description: Icon identifier for the composer channel. Can be overridden via low-code schema configuration.

loadAttachments.description: Load existing attachments when `messageId` is set. Set to `false` to suppress attachment loading for the current message (clears existing attachments on edit).

message.description: Initial message text pre-populated in the editor (used when editing an existing message).

messageId.description: ID of an existing message to edit; when set and non-empty the composer loads the message's attachments (if `loadAttachments: true`).

parentMessageId.description: ID of the parent message when composing a comment reply; empty for top-level messages.

primaryColumnValue.description: Record ID of the entity this composer is attached to. Bind to `"$Id"` so messages are associated with the current record.

schemaUId.description: UId of the entity schema; used when saving inline images and attachments to correlate files with the correct schema.

messageChangesCanceled.description: Action fired when the user cancels message edits and reverts the `forExternal` state to `forExternalDefault`.

messagePosted.description: Action fired after a message is successfully posted or updated. Payload is the `Guid` of the created/updated message.

components.description: Message composer for creating feed posts with channel selection, external post support, and reply threading.

allowExternalPost.description: Show the external-audience toggle on the inline reply composer within this item.

customVisibleItemActionsMenu.description: Custom predicate that controls action menu visibility; defaults to `true` only for the message author (matches `userInfo.contactId` to `item.CreatedBy.value`).

disableLikesComments.description: Suppress the likes and comments controls on this item.

disableSelectionOptions.description: Disable the selection checkbox or selection-related controls on this item.

feedType.description: Feed source type; determines how the item is displayed (e.g. record feed vs. global feed).

isDraftItem.description: When `true`, renders the item with a draft visual style.

isEditMode.description: When `true`, the item is shown in its editable composer view; toggled internally when the user clicks Edit.

isTheLastComment.description: When `true`, hides the "load more comments" control below this item (used to signal this is the last comment in a thread).

item.description: Feed message data object to render. Contains body, author, attachment metadata, comment count, and access level.

itemActionItems.description: Override the default Edit/Delete action menu items. Each item must satisfy `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` with a `handleItemClick` callback.

loadAttachments.description: Load file attachments for this message on init. Set to `false` to suppress the attachment request and display an empty file list.

loadCurrentUserPhoto.description: Load the current user's photo for the author avatar. Set to `false` to skip the photo request.

readingMode.description: Reading mode filter; `All` shows all messages, `Unread` shows only unread ones.

schemaName.description: Entity schema name for the record this message belongs to; used for entity link navigation.

showMenuActionItems.description: Show the action menu button (Edit/Delete) on hover. Set to `false` to hide all action items.

useCustomHead.description: When `true`, the parent component provides a custom header slot instead of rendering the default message header.

useCustomPhoto.description: When `true`, the parent component provides a custom author photo slot instead of loading the default user photo.

messageDeleted.description: Action fired when the user confirms deletion of this message. Payload is the deleted `FeedMessage`.

messageEdited.description: Action fired after the user saves an edit to this message. Payload is the updated message `Guid`.

selectionChange.description: Action fired when the selection state of this item changes (e.g. when an edit is canceled via the inline composer).

components.description: Individual feed message item with likes, comments, edit, delete, and reply capabilities.

disabled.description: Prevent drag-and-drop interactions. When `true`, all drag events are ignored and `fileDropped` never fires.

multiple.description: Allow dropping more than one file at once. When `false`, drops with more than one item are rejected before `fileDropped` fires.

showOverlay.description: Show a visual overlay when files are dragged over the drop zone. Set to `false` to suppress the drag-enter indicator.

fileDropped.description: Action fired when the user drops files onto the zone. Configure as `{ request, params? }` to forward the `files` array to a handler.

components.description: File drop zone container for drag-and-drop file uploads with overlay indicator.

record.description: Object with data of the item record.

tileSizeClasses.description: Returns style classes to specify tile size.

accept.description: Allowed file types filter (HTML `accept` string). Use comma-separated extensions (`.pdf,.docx`) or MIME types; empty string allows all files.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

maxFileSize.description: Maximum upload size in **megabytes**. Files exceeding this limit trigger a localized error notification and are not uploaded.

multiline.description: Whether the input renders as a multi-line textarea. Disabled for email/url data types via the data source attribute.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the empty input.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Current input value. Setting this updates the bound `control`; prefer binding `control` via the data source attribute and read this for one-way reads.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

cancelUpload.description: Action fired when the user cancels an in-progress upload.

delete.description: Action fired when the user removes the current file. The control value is cleared locally; the handler must also remove the file from server storage.

download.description: Action fired when the user clicks the download action. Payload is `{ detail: { file: FileValue } }`.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

preview.description: Action fired when the user clicks the preview action for the current file.

upload.description: Action fired when the user selects a file. Payload is `{ detail: { file: FileUploadDto } }`; the handler must call the file service to persist the upload.

components.description: File picker and uploader for binary attachments.

bulkActions.description: Mass-action menu items shown when one or more rows are selected (requires `features.rows.selection.multiple: true`). Each item is a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` with a `clicked` request binding receiving the selected rows.

droppable.description: Toggle that enables the drag-and-drop zone for file uploads. Pair with the `fileDropped` action to handle dropped files.

fileGroups.description: File category filter. Restricts the visible attachments to specific groups (e.g. `[FileGroupEnum.Attachments]`).

fitContent.description: When true the grid hugs its content width; when false it fills the available width of the parent container.

masterRecordColumnValue.description: Identifier of the parent record. Typically bound as `"$Id"` so the file list shows attachments for the page's master record.

recordColumnName.description: Name of the column on the file entity that references the parent record (e.g. `"RecordId"`).

stretch.description: When true the grid stretches to fill the parent container's available height; otherwise it sizes to its content.

style.description: Visual style of the grid. `plain-white` is the default flat look; `glass-effect` enables glassmorphism and switches toolbar buttons to a light variant.

tag.description: Tag string used to filter files by a custom category. Empty value disables tag filtering.

viewType.description: Layout mode for the file list. `list` renders a data grid; `gallery` renders preview tiles.

activeRowChange.description: Action invoked when the user activates a different row (typically single-click). Payload is the row's primary key.

cancelItemsChanges.description: Action invoked when the user discards pending inline edits. Payload is the list of changed records being reverted.

columnsChange.description: Action invoked when the user edits the column set (add/remove/reorder via the column toolbar). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the updated column definitions.

createItem.description: Action invoked when a new inline row is created (requires `features.editable.itemsCreation: true`). Payload describes the new row position.

deleteItem.description: Action invoked when the user deletes a row via the row toolbar.

fileDropped.description: Action invoked when files are dropped onto the drop zone (requires `droppable: true`). The payload `{ files }` carries the dropped `File[]`.

hierarchicalRowsStateChange.description: Action invoked when the overall hierarchy expand/collapse state changes. Payload is the full `HierarchyState`.

hierarchicalRowStateChange.description: Action invoked when a single hierarchical row is expanded or collapsed (requires `features.hierarchical.enable: true`).

paginationChange.description: Action invoked when the user scrolls to load the next page. Payload includes `rowsOffset` and `pageSize` for the request handler.

rowDoubleClick.description: Action invoked on row double-click — typically used to open the row's record page. Payload is the `DataTableRowContext` for the clicked row.

saveItemsChanges.description: Action invoked when the user commits pending inline edits (requires `features.editable.enable: true`).

selectionStateChange.description: Action invoked when the user changes the selection (checkbox toggles, select-all). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the full `DataGridRowsSelectionState`.

sortingChange.description: Action invoked when the user changes column sorting via the column toolbar. Payload is the updated sorting config array.

uploadClicked.description: Action invoked when the user clicks the upload button. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` (typically `crt.UploadFileRequest`) to open the file picker.

components.description: File/attachment list component with drag-and-drop upload, gallery/list view modes, and file grouping. Extends DataGrid.
useCases: Display and manage a list of file attachments on a record
components.whenToUse: Use to list and manage file attachments (documents) on a record.
components.whenNotToUse: Not for displaying images as a visual gallery (use crt.Gallery) or a single image (use crt.ImageInput).

file.description: File value to load into the viewer; changing it triggers document loading when the viewer is ready.

loading.description: Loading toggle for the preview mask; false hides the mask after a short delay to avoid flicker.

options.description: Viewer options such as zoom; changes are ignored when equal to the current options object.

optionsChange.description: Emits viewer option changes so page state can keep zoom and other options synchronized.

components.description: Document preview surface that loads a file and syncs viewer options back to the page model.

items.description: List of items to display. Each item must have `id`, `caption`, `isActive`, and `isFavorite`; update with a new array reference to trigger re-render.

favoriteStateChanged.description: Action fired when the user toggles the favorite star on an item. The handler receives `{ id, isFavorite }` and must update the `items` attribute to persist the new state.

itemSelected.description: Action fired when the user clicks an item. Configure as `{ request, params? }` to receive the selected item `id`.

applyFiltersAutomatically.description: When `true`, the filter change is emitted immediately after each user edit; when `false`, the user must click Apply to propagate the filter.

closeButtonVisible.description: When `true`, the panel renders its built-in close button (default). Set to `false` when the host page embeds the panel standalone and does not need the close affordance.

data.description: Current filter state. Accepts three forms, all normalized internally and rendered in the filter panel: - `FilterBuilderData` — full `{ elements, group, elementsData? }` shape. - `FilterBuilderElement[]` — flat element array (group is reconstructed from elements). - `string` — a `FilterGroup.toJson()` payload as JSON; used when the panel is bound to a page attribute via `filterStorage: "$<attr>"`. Malformed JSON leaves the panel empty rather than throwing.

schemaName.description: Entity schema name for which the filter columns are loaded. Accepts either a plain string (the technical schema name) or a `LookupValue` — `{ value, displayValue }` — in which case `displayValue` is resolved first, then `value`. `null` / `undefined` resolves to an empty string and disables the filter column source until a valid name is bound.

viewElement.description: Name of the linked `crt.FilterBuilderToggler` view element that controls this panel's visibility.

changed.description: Action fired when the filter state changes (immediately when `applyFiltersAutomatically: true`, or when the user clicks Apply). Payload is a `FilterBuilderData` object.

visibilityChanged.description: Action fired when the panel is closed via its close button. Payload contains `viewName`, `schemaName`, and `forceClose: true`.

components.description: Filter builder data source component providing filter elements for a given entity schema.

active.description: Toggle state; `true` when the linked filter panel is currently visible.

data.description: Current filter state from the linked source. Used internally to reflect whether any filters are active (drives the toggle indicator).

schemaName.description: Entity schema name forwarded in the `visibilityChanged` payload; should match the linked `crt.FilterBuilderSource` schema.

viewElement.description: Name of the linked `crt.FilterBuilderSource` view element. The toggler is disabled when this is empty or unset.

visibilityChanged.description: Action fired when the user clicks the toggler button. Payload contains `viewName` and `schemaName`; the linked `crt.FilterBuilderSource` listens to this to show or hide itself.

components.description: Toggle button to show/hide the filter builder panel for a given entity schema.

entitySchemaName.description: Entity schema name whose filter editor is rendered. Changing this value at runtime resets `filterData` to `null` (debounced 50 ms).

filterData.description: Serialized JSON string holding the current filter state (`FilterGroup` format). Bind to a `$Attribute` and persist changes via `filterDataChange`.

filterDataChange.description: Action fired when the user edits the filter. The payload is the new serialized JSON string; assign it back to the `filterData` attribute to persist changes.

components.description: Container for advanced filter builder UI bound to an entity schema.

alignItems.description: Alignment of children along the cross axis (perpendicular to `direction`). `'stretch'` makes each child fill the cross axis; the other values anchor them.

direction.description: Flow direction of the children — `'row'` lays them out horizontally, `'column'` vertically. The `-reverse` variants flip the order.

fitContent.description: Layout toggle that shrinks the container to fit its children. When `false`, the container reserves its full grid-cell area.

gap.description: Spacing between adjacent children. Accepts a `SizeEnum` keyword (`none`/`xs`/`small`/`medium`/`large`/`xl`/`xxl`) or a raw pixel `number`.

items.description: Child view elements rendered inside this container.

justifyContent.description: Distribution of children along the main axis. `'start'`/`'end'`/`'center'` cluster them; the `'space-*'` values spread them out with equal gutters; `'stretch'` makes them fill the axis.

padding.description: Container padding. Accepts a single size keyword (`none`/`xs`/`s`/`m`/`l`/`xl`/`xxl`/`small`/`medium`/`large`) or a per-side object `{ top, bottom, left, right }`.

role.description: ARIA `role` attribute applied to the container element. Set only when the container plays a semantic role for assistive tech (e.g. `'toolbar'`, `'navigation'`); leave unset otherwise.

stretch.description: Layout toggle that lets the container fill the available width/height of its parent grid cell. When `false`, the container keeps its intrinsic size.

wrap.description: Wrap behavior when children overflow the main axis. `'wrap'` lets them flow onto new lines; `'nowrap'` keeps them on one line and lets the container scroll instead.

innerScroll.description: Fired when the user scrolls inside the container (when content overflows). Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to bind to a request handler; without a `request` the scroll event is observed but no handler runs.

components.description: Flexbox layout container for vertical or horizontal grouping of child elements.

activeFolderId.description: ID of the currently selected folder; `null` or empty GUID selects the virtual root. Persisting and re-binding this keeps selection across page re-renders.

borderRadius.description: Corner rounding style of the host element. Maps `SizeEnum` keywords to px values (`small`→4px, `medium`→8px, `large`→16px); `none`/`default` removes border-radius.

expandedItems.description: Array of folder IDs whose tree nodes are currently expanded. Persisting and re-binding this restores the expansion state across page re-renders.

favoriteItems.description: Favorite folder items rendered in a separate "Favorites" virtual root section. Reads `Id`, `Name`, `FolderTreeId`, `FolderTypeId`, `FilterData` from each item.

items.description: Folder data items to render in the tree. Accepts a `DataItem[]` or a live `BaseViewModelCollection` (auto-updates on `changed`); reads `Id`, `Name`, `ParentId`, `FilterData`, `FolderTypeId` from each item.

minVisibleItemsCount.description: Minimum number of folder items to render in the virtual scroll viewport before clipping; default `5`.

readonly.description: Disable all folder add/rename/copy/move/delete actions; the tree remains navigable but read-only.

rootSchemaName.description: Entity schema name of the page's primary record; used in filter dialogs and move-folder dialogs to scope the filter builder.

showMask.description: Show a loading overlay while folder data is being fetched. Applied with a 0 ms delay; removed with a 50 ms delay to avoid flicker.

sortingOrder.description: Alphabetical sort direction for folder nodes; default `ASC`. Applies to all levels of the hierarchy.

sourceSchemaName.description: Schema name of the folder entity (default `"FolderTree"`); used to check add/edit/delete rights and load entity metadata.

useStaticFolders.description: Show the "Add static folder" menu item and support static-folder operations. Enable only when the data schema supports static folders.

activeFolderChanged.description: Action fired when the user selects a folder. Payload includes `id`, `filterData` (JSON), `folderTreeId`, `folderTypeId`, `rootSchemaName`, `name`, and `isFavorite`.

addFolder.description: Action fired when the user confirms adding a new folder. Handler must persist the folder to the datasource.

convertToStaticFolder.description: Action fired when the user converts a dynamic folder to a static folder. Handler must persist the new static folder record.

copyFolder.description: Action fired when the user confirms copying a folder. Handler must persist the new folder copy.

deleteFolder.description: Action fired when the user confirms deleting a folder. Handler must remove the folder from the datasource.

folderChangeRights.description: Action fired when the user opens the rights management dialog for a folder. Handler must open the rights editor for the given entity record.

folderFiltersUpdated.description: Action fired when the user saves filter configuration for a dynamic folder. Payload contains the serialized `filterData` JSON string.

folderRenamed.description: Action fired when the user renames a folder. Handler must persist the new name to the datasource.

folderTreeExpandedItemsChanged.description: Action fired when the user expands or collapses tree nodes. Payload is `{ expandedItems: Guid[] }`; persist and re-bind to restore expansion state.

folderTreeVisibleChanged.description: Action fired when the user clicks the close/hide button on the tree panel. Payload is `{ visible: false }`.

moveFolder.description: Action fired when the user moves a folder to a new parent. Handler must update the folder's parent in the datasource.

toggleFolderFavorite.description: Action fired when the user toggles the favorite star on a folder. Handler must add or remove the favorite record in the datasource.

components.description: Hierarchical folder tree for filtering records by dynamic and static folders with favorites support.

activeFolderId.description: Identifier (GUID string) of the currently active folder; drives the clear-folder button visibility.

activeFolderName.description: Display label of the currently active folder shown on the toggle button when a folder is selected.

favoriteItems.description: Collection of favorite folders shown in the dropdown. Accepts a live `BaseViewModelCollection` (reacts to add/remove changes) or a static `DataItem[]` (read once at bind time).

folderTree.description: Name of the sibling `crt.FolderTree` element this action bar is paired with. Must match the `name` field of that element exactly; the component subscribes to its folder-selection state via this reference.

activeFolderChanged.description: Action fired when the active folder changes (user clears selection or picks a favorite). Bind as `{ request: '<RequestType>' }` to a handler that updates the page filter.

folderTreeVisibleChanged.description: Action fired when the toggle-panel button is clicked to show or hide the paired `crt.FolderTree`. Bind as `{ request: '<RequestType>' }` to a handler that controls the folder-tree panel visibility.

components.description: Additional component for doing some quick actions with FolderTree.

forecastSheetId.description: Sheet id of the forecast this grid renders. The data load is dispatched by `ForecastGridInitLoadHandler` on `crt.HandleViewModelInitRequest` rather than from this setter — under reuseStrategy:Reuse the parent re-binds the same id on navigate-back, so a setter-emit would silently no-op.

profileScope.description: Stable partition key set by the preprocessor; survives a user rename of `name`.

allowEditingForAll.description:
Per-column flag projected from `ForecastColumn.Settings`.
 - `allowEditingForAll` — Editable only; when true the cell is editable at
   every hierarchy level (the materializer creates DB rows for groups + self).
   `canEdit` becomes `isEditable && (record.isLeaf || allowEditingForAll)`.

entitySchemaName.description: Source entity schema name for ObjectValue columns; used to scope drill filters.

forecastColumnId.description:
Composite-key inputs the `SaveCell` writer needs.

 - `forecastColumnId` — ForecastColumn UId (indicator UId server-side).
 - `periodId`         — ForecastPeriod UId for this column's period.
 - `isEditable`       — projected server-side from
   `column.TypeId == EditableColumnTypeId`. The numeric cell uses it
   to decide whether to render an edit affordance.

All three are optional so the primary (Name) column doesn't need to
pretend to be editable.

forecastColumnType.description:
`ForecastColumnType` code projected from the wire `type` field. Set by
`convertColumnsToColumnDefinitions` only when the wire value is a recognized
code; the forecast value cell falls back to `DEFAULT_FORECAST_GRID_COLUMN_TYPE`
when it is absent.

isTextCell.description:
Renderer discriminator the value cell consults to decide between text vs.
numeric branch. Decoupled from `dataValueType` so future text-typed source
columns (e.g. text-renderer ValueFromObject) can be opted into the text
branch by the column mapper without changing the cell.

periodCaption.description: Display caption of the parent period band (e.g. "Q1 2026").

fields.description: Form field collection used to populate condition and action pickers.

rulesMetadata.description: Serialized form-rule metadata; empty or invalid values reset the rule list.

rulesMetadataChange.description: Emits serialized metadata after rule, condition, or action changes.

components.description: Form business rules engine that applies conditional visibility, required state, and validation rules to page fields.

config.description: Full pipeline widget configuration including entities (multi-stage pipeline), title, color, theme, and optional section-binding column. Setting this triggers legend data reload.

toolbarMenuItems.description: Action toolbar items displayed in the widget header. Each entry is a view-element config for a button or menu item injected into the widget's toolbar row.

components.description: Full pipeline funnel widget for multi-entity pipelines (e.g. Lead → Opportunity). Extends FunnelWidget with a legend panel and cross-entity connection visualization. Requires the Opportunity package.

config.description: Funnel widget configuration: entity schema(s), title, color, theme, and optional section-binding column. Setting a new value clears active subscriptions and rebuilds the chart.

funnelTypeList.description: Toggle button labels for funnel slice-type views (by count, stage conversion, to first stage). Override to restrict available views or localize labels beyond the built-in defaults.

pagingConfig.description: Paging config for drill down datagrid.

columnsChange.description: Fire event when datagrid columns are changed.

drillDown.description: Fire event when chart column clicked.

getProfileColumns.description: Fire event when profile columns are requested.

paginationChange.description: Fire event when datagrid drill down pagination change.

resetToDefault.description: Fire event when datagrid reset to default action called.

searchFilterChange.description: Fire event when analytics widget search filter is changed.

sortingChange.description: Fire event when datagrid sorting is changed.

components.description: Pipeline funnel widget for visualizing entity stage progression (e.g. Opportunity stages). Shows count, stage conversion, and conversion-to-first-stage views. Requires the Opportunity package.

ariaLabel.description: Accessibility label announced by screen readers.

bulkActions.description: Dropdown actions shown when one or more items are selected. Each item is a `CrtMenuItemViewElementConfig` with a `clicked` request binding.

itemConfig.description: Per-item template/binding config (`templateValuesMapping` for caption/description/image column names, `referenceSchema`, `defaultSize`). Most schemas leave it empty and rely on framework defaults.

items.description: Source records to render. Bind via `"$<Attr>"` to a collection attribute (e.g., the data source's `Items` exposed attribute).

itemStyles.description: Inline style object applied to every item wrapper (e.g., `{ background: '...' }`).

mode.description: Item rendering strategy. `component-type` uses a registered view-element type; `view-element-config` renders an inline config provided per item.

multiselect.description: Whether multiple items can be selected at once. Switches the gallery from single-select (`selectedItemId`) to multi-select (`selectionState` + `bulkActions`).

selectable.description: Whether item selection is enabled. When `false`, clicking items does not toggle selection or emit `selectedItemIdChange`.

selectedItemId.description: Currently selected item id (single-select mode). Bind to a data source attribute (`"$<Attr>"`) for two-way sync with `selectedItemIdChange`.

selectionState.description: Multi-select state (`{ type: 'specific', selected: Guid[] }` or `{ type: 'all', unselected: Guid[] }`). Bind via `"$<Attr>"` to round-trip with `selectionStateChange`. `type: 'all'` is coerced to a `'specific'` empty selection at runtime.

itemClick.description: Action invoked when an item is clicked. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the clicked `DataItemModel`.

itemDblClick.description: Action invoked when an item is double-clicked (commonly used to open a record). Same request-binding shape as `itemClick`.

itemEvent.description: Action invoked when an item emits a custom inner event (e.g., a button inside the item template). Payload includes the event and the item.

paginationChange.description: Action invoked when the last item enters the viewport (infinite-scroll trigger). Bind to a request that loads the next page.

selectedItemIdChange.description: Action invoked when the selected id changes in single-select mode. Pair with `selectedItemId` for two-way binding.

selectionStateChange.description: Action invoked when the multi-select state changes. Pair with `selectionState` for two-way binding.

components.description: Gallery list component with selectable cards, pagination events, and bulk menu actions.
useCases: Display a collection of images or photos as browsable preview cards
components.whenToUse: Use for an image or photo gallery — the right choice for any image-gallery or photo-grid prompt.
components.whenNotToUse: Not for tabular records with columns (use crt.DataGrid) or a single image field (use crt.ImageInput).

config.description: Gauge widget configuration: title, aggregated-data providing block, text template, color/theme, threshold bands (`thresholds`), and `min`/`max` scale limits. Setting this rebuilds markers and gauge state.

pagingConfig.description: Paging config for drill down datagrid.

columnsChange.description: Fire event when datagrid columns are changed.

drillDown.description: Fire event when chart column clicked.

getProfileColumns.description: Fire event when profile columns are requested.

paginationChange.description: Fire event when datagrid drill down pagination change.

resetToDefault.description: Fire event when datagrid reset to default action called.

searchFilterChange.description: Fire event when analytics widget search filter is changed.

sortingChange.description: Fire event when datagrid sorting is changed.

components.description: Gauge (speedometer) widget showing a single aggregated metric on a semicircular scale with configurable min/max range and color-coded thresholds.

alignItems.description: Alignment of children along the block (row) axis within their cell. `'stretch'` makes each child fill the cell height; the other values anchor them inside it.

allowOverlap.description: When `true`, children whose `layoutConfig` cells overlap are rendered stacked instead of being nudged apart. Use for absolutely-positioned overlay children; leave `false` for normal grids.

columns.description: Column track-list. Each array entry is a CSS sizing function (e.g. `'minmax(64px, 1fr)'`, `'100px'`, `'1fr'`); the array length determines how many columns the grid has. A bare string is treated as `grid-auto-columns`.

fitContent.description: Layout toggle that shrinks the container to fit its children. When `false`, the container reserves its full grid-cell area.

gap.description: Spacing between grid tracks. Use the `{ columnGap, rowGap }` object form to set per-axis gutters (`SizeEnum` keywords on each side); a bare `SizeEnum`/`number`/CSS string applies the same gutter to both axes.

items.description: Child view elements rendered inside this container.

justifyItems.description: Alignment of children along the inline (column) axis within their cell. `'stretch'` makes each child fill the cell width; the other values anchor them inside it.

padding.description: Container padding. Accepts a single size keyword (`none`/`xs`/`s`/`m`/`l`/`xl`/`xxl`/`small`/`medium`/`large`) or a per-side object `{ top, bottom, left, right }`.

rows.description: Row track-list. A single CSS sizing function (e.g. `'minmax(max-content, 32px)'`) is applied as `grid-auto-rows` so rows are generated on demand; an array of track sizes is applied as an explicit `grid-template-rows`.

stretch.description: Layout toggle that lets the container fill the available width/height of its parent grid cell. When `false`, the container keeps its intrinsic size.

components.description: Grid-based layout container with explicit rows, columns, gap, and child layoutConfig placement.

fitContent.description: Layout toggle that shrinks the container to fit its children. When `false`, the container reserves its full grid-cell area.

items.description: Child view elements rendered inside this container.

padding.description: Container padding. Accepts a single size keyword (`none`/`xs`/`s`/`m`/`l`/`xl`/`xxl`/`small`/`medium`/`large`) or a per-side object `{ top, bottom, left, right }`.

stretch.description: Layout toggle that lets the container fill the available width/height of its parent grid cell. When `false`, the container keeps its intrinsic size.

title.description: Optional plain-text label rendered inside the header bar. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text; leave unset and place rich content in `items` for complex header layouts.

components.description: Header layout container commonly used for page title, actions, and compact summary content.

htmlCode.description: HTML markup value displayed in the editor.

readOnly.description: Read-only toggle that prevents editing while still showing the HTML markup.

htmlCodeChange.description: Emits changed HTML markup when the editor text value is different.

autoResolveMacro.description: When `true`, macro placeholders in the initial content and inserted macros are resolved server-side before being placed into the editor. Requires `recordId` and `entitySchemaName`.

control.description: Reactive `FormControl<string>` bound via a `$`-prefixed viewModel attribute. The platform resolves the control automatically; always pass a `$`-prefixed attribute reference from the page schema.

customToolbar.description: Custom CKEditor toolbar definition. When provided, replaces the default toolbar layout; use the CKEditor4 toolbar group format `[['Bold', 'Italic'], ['Link']]`.

enablePreview.description: Shows the inline preview button that fires `previewRequested`; wire `previewRequested` to a handler that returns the resolved HTML for display.

entitySchemaName.description: Entity schema name used by the macro helper and template picker to scope available macros and templates. Required when `showMacroHelper` or `useTemplates` is enabled.

height.description: Height of the editor area in pixels. Defaults to `300`.

macroCategories.description: Macro category definitions for the macro picker. When empty, falls back to the built-in default categories derived from `entitySchemaName`.

macroSourceSchemaName.description: Alternative entity schema for macro resolution. When set, macros are resolved against this schema instead of `entitySchemaName`; defaults to `entitySchemaName` when blank.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown when the editor is empty. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text; falls back to a default translation when blank.

plainText.description: Read-only plain-text representation of the current HTML content; updated automatically on every change. Bind to a viewModel attribute when you need the stripped text value alongside the HTML.

readonly.description: Puts the editor into read-only mode; disables all editing, macro insertion, and template selection.

recordId.description: Record GUID (or `{ value: Guid }` lookup shape) for the current record. Required by `autoResolveMacro` and `enablePreview` to resolve macro values and generate preview content.

selectedTemplateBody.description: Receives the body HTML of the selected email template. Setting a non-empty string inserts the content into the editor (with optional macro resolution when `autoResolveMacro` is `true`).

showMacroHelper.description: Shows the inline macro-insertion button and the macro toolbar button when `true`. Requires `entitySchemaName` (or `macroSourceSchemaName`) for macro resolution.

showStatusPanel.description: Shows the character/word count status panel below the editor when `true` and content is present.

showTemplatesButton.description: Shows the dedicated templates button in the toolbar when `true`. Fires `templatesButtonClick` on click; bind that output to open a template picker dialog.

subjectAttributeName.description: Attribute name for the email subject field. When set, the templates button passes this attribute name in the `SelectHtmlEditorTemplateRequest` so the handler can also populate the subject field.

useTemplates.description: Enables email template selection support; adds an internal template-select action when `true`.

contentChange.description: Action fired on every editor value change; payload is the current HTML string. Bind to an attribute write handler when you need to persist the value outside the FormControl.

macroInserted.description: Action fired after a macro is inserted into the editor. Payload is the `HtmlEditorMacro` object.

plainTextChange.description: Action fired when the plain-text representation of the content changes; payload is the stripped text.

previewCompleted.description: Action fired when the preview has been fully resolved and is ready to display.

previewRequested.description: Action fired when the preview button is clicked. Bind as `{ request: '<Type>' }` to a handler that resolves macros and shows a preview dialog. Requires `enablePreview: true`.

selectTemplate.description: Action fired when the built-in template selection flow starts (internal use; prefer `templatesButtonClick` for custom template pickers).

templatesButtonClick.description: Action fired when the custom templates button is clicked; bind as `{ request: '<Type>' }` to a handler that opens a template picker and sets `selectedTemplateBody`.

templateSelected.description: Action fired when a template has been loaded and inserted into the editor. The payload includes the resolved HTML body and subject template.

components.description: Rich HTML editor based on CKEditor with macro support, email template integration, and preview capability.

ariaLabel.description: Accessibility label announced by screen readers.

backgroundColor.description: Background color. Used only when `backgroundType` is `circle` or `square`. Accepts any CSS color value.

backgroundType.description: Background shape behind the icon. `none` removes the background; `circle`/`square` show a colored backdrop sized via `padding`.

color.description: Icon foreground color. Accepts any CSS color value (hex, rgb, named).

iconName.description: Icon name. References a registered Creatio icon (e.g., `'info-icon'`); see the icon catalog for available names.

padding.description: Spacing between the icon and the background edge. Has no visible effect when `backgroundType` is `none`.

size.description: Icon size preset. Real schemas use named sizes like `'small'`/`'medium'`/`'large'`/`'extra-large'`.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover/focus. An empty value disables the tooltip overlay.

control.description: Reactive `FormControl` bound via a `$`-prefixed viewModel attribute. The selected button's `value` is written to this control; read the attribute to get the current selection.

direction.description: Layout direction of the button group. `"row"` places buttons side by side (default); `"column"` stacks them vertically.

disabled.description: Disables all buttons in the group when `true`. Pair with `disabledStateTooltip` to explain why.

disabledStateTooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover over any button when the group is disabled.

items.description: Radio option definitions. Each entry specifies a `value`, a `caption` label, and an optional `icon` name. Selecting a button writes its `value` to the `control`.

label.description: Field label displayed above the button group. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelTooltip.description: Tooltip shown on the field label on hover.

radioGroupAriaLabel.description: ARIA label for the radio group element; used by screen readers to announce the group role.

value.description: Current selected value; synced from the `control` value. Typically not set manually — use the `control` binding and the viewModel attribute instead.

components.description: Radio button group rendered as icon buttons with row or column layout.

allow.description: Permissions policy (allowed features) for the iframe. Values must be separated by ';' (e.g. 'microphone; display-capture; fullscreen'). Supported values: camera, microphone, geolocation, fullscreen, autoplay, payment, display-capture, picture-in-picture.

htmlContent.description: Inline HTML content rendered via the iframe `srcdoc` attribute. Ignored when `urlContent` is set.

sandbox.description: Sandbox permissions for iframe content. Use space-separated values (e.g. 'allow-scripts allow-same-origin'). Supported values: allow-forms, allow-modals, allow-popups, allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox, allow-presentation, allow-same-origin, allow-scripts, allow-top-navigation, allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation, allow-top-navigation-to-custom-protocols, allow-downloads.

urlContent.description: Iframe source URL. Takes priority over `htmlContent`; when set, the iframe loads this URL via `src`.

components.description: Embedded iframe component for loading external URLs or rendering inline HTML content with configurable sandbox and permissions.

alt.description: Accessibility `alt` text for the rendered image.

ariaLabel.description: Screen reader label for the field. Falls back to the visible label when empty.

borderRadius.description: Corner rounding. Accepts a `SizeEnum` token (`small`/`medium`/`large`/`extra-large`), a number (px), or any CSS length string (e.g., `'50%'` for a circle).

colorId.description: Seed used by `placeholderMode: 'abbreviation'` to pick a stable background color. Bind to a record id to keep the color consistent per contact/account.

control.description: Form control that holds the field value. In schemas, bind with `"$<AttributeName>"` to link the input to a data source attribute.

disabled.description: Disables user interaction with the input. Bindable as `$Attribute | crt.ToBoolean` for runtime control.

label.description: Field label displayed above or beside the input. Use `#ResourceString(<key>)#` for localized text.

labelPosition.description: Label placement relative to the input. `auto` switches between `left` and `above` based on container width; `hidden` keeps the label for accessibility only.

maxFileSize.description: Maximum upload size in bytes. Forwarded as `maxFileSize` on the `imageSelected` payload; the system setting `MaxImageSize` is shown as a placeholder default.

multiline.description: Whether the input renders as a multi-line textarea. Disabled for email/url data types via the data source attribute.

placeholder.description: Icon name or abbreviation seed shown when no image is loaded. For `'abbreviation'` `placeholderMode`, seeds initials and background color; for `'icon'` mode, names the icon to display.

placeholderMode.description: Placeholder style when no image is set. `abbreviation` shows initials from `placeholder` over a contact-style color; `icon` shows the icon named by `placeholder`.

positioning.description: Image fit inside the frame (CSS `object-fit`). `cover` crops to fill; `scale-down` shrinks to fit without cropping.

readonly.description: Editability toggle. When `true`, the field renders as non-editable; pair with `disabled` to also dim the styling.

size.description: Image frame size preset. Ignored when both `customWidth` and `customHeight` are set.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover next to the label.

value.description: Bound view-model attribute (e.g. `'$PDS_Photo'`) or empty string for unbound. Prefer this property over `control` for image fields.

blurred.description: Action invoked when the input loses focus.

focused.description: Action invoked when the input gains focus.

imageClear.description: Action invoked when the user clears the current image. Bind to a request that clears the stored value.

imageSelected.description: Action invoked when the user picks a file. Payload: `{ file, maxFileSize }`. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }` to upload the file via a handler.

keyDown.description: Action invoked on each `keydown` over the input. Same request-binding shape as `keyUp`; useful for capturing Enter/Escape before the value changes.

keyUp.description: Action invoked on each `keyup` over the input. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>', params?: {...} }`; payload is the `KeyboardEvent`.

components.description: Image uploader and preview control. Binds through the value property, not control.

headingLevel.description: Semantic HTML tag the label renders as (`h1`-`h4` for document outline, `label` for form association). Affects accessibility and DOM, not visual style — use `labelType` for typography.

linkType.description: Typography preset applied to the link text. Controls visual scale, not color or underline.

payload.description: Arbitrary value forwarded in the `clicked` event as `event.payload`.

underlining.description: Controls when the underline decoration appears: `"always"`, `"hover"`, or `"never"`.

The setter performs a shallow `Object.assign` over the internal config, so only the keys you pass are replaced; everything else (toolbar layout, plugins, languages, file-upload wiring, etc.) stays at platform defaults. Use this to tweak CKEditor 4 options such as `removeButtons`, `format_tags`, `enterMode`, custom skins, etc.

Each name must refer to a plugin already registered in the CKEditor 4 runtime; unknown names are silently ignored by CKEditor.

filesStorage.description: Attachment storage binding: where the editor saves dropped/pasted/uploaded files. Shape: `{ masterRecordColumnValue, recordEntitySchemaName, recordColumnName, entitySchemaName }`. Defaults target the platform `SysFile` table (`entitySchemaName: 'SysFile'`, `recordColumnName: 'RecordId'`); `masterRecordColumnValue` is typically the page record's `'$Id'` attribute.

disableLink.description: When `true`, the email address is rendered as plain text without a clickable mailto link or icon button.

components.description: Renders the web-chat widget inside Creatio Freedom UI by embedding the widget's `frame-host.html` in an iframe and communicating config via postMessage. The widget uses an iframe-isolated architecture: the React `frame-host.html` (served from `/assets-react/`) loads the widget loader + runtime bundle within its own origin, avoiding CORS restrictions and module loading issues in the host page. The host posts `previewBridge: true` in the init payload, which switches the widget's `BridgeChatTransport` on: visitor messages are posted back to this host, relayed through `OmnichannelPreviewService` (StartSession / SendMessage / EndSession), and AI / operator replies arriving on the `NewConversationMessage` WebSocket are injected back into the widget as synthetic `agent-message` events. The preview therefore drives the real backend rather than a scripted echo. Each widget configuration field is exposed as an individual `@Input` / `@CrtInput` so that Freedom UI schemas can bind page attributes directly to the component.

label.description: Visible label text shown above the input field. Pass a pre-resolved translated string.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the input when the value is empty. Pass a pre-resolved translated string.

readonly.description: Makes the field non-editable (but still focusable and submitted) and reflects `readonly` as a host element attribute. Uses `booleanAttribute` transform — pass a boolean, not a string.

required.description: Marks the field as required and reflects `required` as a host element attribute. Uses `booleanAttribute` transform — pass a boolean, not a string.

value.description: Current text value displayed in the input. Bind to a `$Attribute` for two-way control; changes are emitted via `valueChange`.

valueChange.description: Action fired on every native `input` event with the new string value. Configure as `{ request: '<RequestType>' }` to bind to a handler; native `input`/`change` CustomEvents also bubble through the Shadow DOM boundary with `detail: { value }`.

name.description: Schema-unique element code. The advanced settings input that identifies this element in the view config and is referenced by other elements (e.g. `crt.ButtonToggleGroup`'s `for`, `crt.TabPanel` activation).

type.description: Discriminator. Always equals the component's componentType. Emit values.type = componentType verbatim; ignore any per-component overrides.
